reviews.review_description: Super polished and fun.  Perfectly reproduced these feel of the classic arcade games. Two visual styles put a nice fresh face on things.
Fun, easy game play. It's old school meets virtual reality.  Smooth game play,  pleasing graphics,  challenging levels.
I would ha e given it 5 stars but everytime im about to break my record in Swarm the game crashes on me. NOTE 7 (the exploding version)
Awsome work. More plz 10/10
Looking forward to more like this
This just happened to me for the 3rd time won't buy on oculus now until issue is resolved need refund from oculus or Amex need to find out who n repost back to u guys.
Loved everything about this game and looking forward to what's to come next...5 stars from me...

What a nice experience to play again the games from our childhood in this way. Simple but beautiful graphics. Totally worth what I paid for this! It would be great though to add more games in the future like Bomber Man or also another skins. Good job!
Would be awesome, easily five stars but sadly it freezes (S7) sigh :(
Good for quick games and demoing.
A great collection of pick up and play games. Lots of fun. Just remember to play with a gamepad !
This is the ONLY  vr app that freezes after a few minutes.  Shame cause my fav  ���
Love it! Each game even has two different designs (one futuristic one ghost). The main issue I have is it does not support Oculus Go controller (but the game is still very playable).

4 rather basic clones of classic arcade games in a single app is nice, but is it better than playing the original games in their classic 2D pixel glory? I don’t think so. Reduced visibility alone is annoying.
Also, no support for oculus controller, playing without gamepad is kinda painful.
The graveyard theme makes the game more playable because it is more legible, too many transparencies and particles in the default one.
Music feels repetitive even after a few minutes.
Screen resolution is not very high.

Games freeze after a few minutes (Galaxy S7) and controls are not consistent between games. In some games, you can use the controller to pull up the menu, in others you'll have to use the buttons on your Gear. Once joystick mode of activated, there is no way to go back to gaze control without restarting, so don't accidentally hit your joystick! Bought this as part of a bundle and not really impressed. Will consider a higher rating if the devs bring it up to something better than a beta.

I can understand the need for auto fire on the Galaga clone when using just an oculus go controller but when using a game pad you should NOT auto fire. It destroys the old school feeling of picking out the aliens. Also do the two shot guys ever capture? Seems like they should. Will revise if dev updates.

developer_response.body: Hi Websteria! Thanks for checking out Hypercade. Try changing the game mode from "Hyper" to "Classic". This will disable auto-fire and allow you to manual fire using the controller. And yes - the capture mechanic in Space Swarm is implemented. It should be much easier to achieve in classic mode.

reviews.review_description: Sometimes freezes, so what, i don't care, it's best arcade VR experience anyway... Gr8 game, please prepare a sequel (defen... aster... galaxi... mrD... puckm... moon pat...) i'll Pay 10$ or more with pleasure. Again - Fantastic Job - It's not a game it's Piece of Art. Sorry 4 my poor "english" i've never Learn this one.
If it a fan of galaga and centipede u will def love this
This app is outstanding! Great job by the developers..One of my favorites and 4 games in 1 app
Well done!
